heading: Duties and reporting requirements of debtors
label: 1187 Duties and reporting requirements of debtors
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title

children.heading: .—Filing Requirements
children.label: a .—Filing Requirements
children.text: Upon electing to be a debtor under this subchapter, the debtor shall file the documents required by subparagraphs (A) and (B) of .section 1116(1) of this title

children.heading: .—Other Applicable Provisions
children.label: b .—Other Applicable Provisions
children.text: A debtor, in addition to the duties provided in this title and as otherwise required by law, shall comply with the requirements of section 308 and paragraphs (2), (3), (4), (5), (6), and (7) of .section 1116 of this title

children.heading: .—Separate Disclosure Statement Exemption
children.label: c .—Separate Disclosure Statement Exemption
children.text: If the court orders under that applies, shall apply.section 1181(b) of this titlesection 1125 of this titlesection 1125(f) of this title
